---
title: "A1"
format: html
editor: visual
---


# active the R packages
```{r, message=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
```

# read the raw data file
assign the data in csv to raw_data
```{r}
raw_data <- read_csv("data/33789541_Xuanning Zhang.csv", col_names = TRUE)
tidied_data <-  raw_data |> na.omit(marketing_spend) 
lm(purchase_amount~marketing_spend, data=tidied_data) |> 
summary()
ggplot(tidied_data, aes(x=marketing_spend, y=purchase_amount)) +
    geom_point()+
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se=TRUE)+
    labs(
        Title="Relationship between marketing spend and purchase amount",
        x= "Marketing Spend",
        y= " Purchase Amount"
    )
```
